items.title: AI giant Anthropic says it plans to list on US stock market
items.dek: The AI company behind Claude is set to offer the public shares of stock sometime this year.
items.body: The AI company behind Claude is set to offer the public shares of stock sometime this year.

items.title: Williams, 44, to return to action in Queen's doubles
items.dek: Serena Williams will return to competitive tennis for the first time in nearly four years when she plays in the women's doubles at Queen's.
items.body: Serena Williams will return to competitive tennis for the first time in nearly four years when she plays in the women's doubles at Queen's.
items.author: IriLine Desk
